MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DOLORES CHONG FOR PLAINIFF ISSA DABAI
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY MARK EPSTEIN FOR DEFENDANT CHRISTINE A KIDDER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR.TERMS OF STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION OF 1802 15TH STREET. JUDGMENT NOT TO BE FILED BEFORE 7/18/05.DEFENDANT TO VACATE BY 5PM 7/15/05, RETURN THE KEYS TO PLAINTIFF, AND LEAVE IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. DEFENDANT WAIVES FURTHER STAYS. DEFENDANT TO BEAR OWN COSTS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS, PER 1542cc. DEFENDANT GIVES UP RIGHT TO TRIAL.ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY REMAINING DEEMED ABANDONED.PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE UPON DEFENDANT VACATING PREMISES. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE, PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK JUDGMENT(BY EXPARTE APPLICATION WITHIN 24 HR NOTICE BY PHONE #255-8206) FOR POSSESSION AND $3000 UNPAID RENT, $32.80 DAILY RENT FROM 5/1/05, AND FEES AND COSTS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:JASON STEIN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE(218)
